description_long: This sculpture depicts three nude female figures standing closely together in a circular embrace, their arms interlinked in a graceful, harmonious pose. The figures are rendered in a classical style, with smooth, flowing lines and detailed anatomical features, suggesting a representation of mythological or allegorical subjects such as The Three Graces. The sculpture is mounted on a round, wooden base, which provides a warm contrast to the cool, pale material of the figures. The figures' hair is intricately styled, and their postures convey a sense of unity and gentle movement. The surface of the sculpture appears smooth and slightly reflective, with subtle shading accentuating the contours of the bodies. The overall composition is elegant and balanced, inviting viewers to walk around and appreciate the work from multiple angles.
description: A classical-style sculpture of three nude female figures embracing in a circle, mounted on a round wooden base. The figures are intricately detailed and convey unity and grace.
description_view_0: From this angle, two of the figures are seen embracing closely, with their backs and intertwined arms prominently visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the backs of all three figures, highlighting their interlocked arms and the curvature of their bodies.
description_view_2: Here, the figures are seen from the side, with one figure partially obscured and a small cylindrical support visible near their legs.
description_view_3: The front view reveals the faces and torsos of all three figures, with their arms gracefully entwined and expressions visible.
attribute_subject_matter: three nude female figures in a classical embrace
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a wooden base, suggesting it could be placed in an indoor gallery, museum, or a sheltered outdoor urban setting.
